details: Created CEO + departments + managers from empty org.
Created John/Sarah/Ahmed employee profiles with no occupancy authority on people.
Assigned all 3 employees through assignment commands.
Transferred Sarah from Sales Manager to Operations Manager.
Validated old assignment ended and new assignment started.
Validated no dual occupancy and outbox event trail.
Ended Ahmed assignment via assignment command.
Validated seat vacancy + preserved ended assignment history.
Verified assignment.ended events recorded for offboarding.
Captured source assignment version before concurrent transfer simulation.
Transfer B failed with 409 version_conflict using same expected version.
Validated winner assignment remains single-active (no dual occupancy).
